Cowles Hall, 1426 Park St, Grinnell, IA 50112, USA

Giving garden with some newly planted trees. A couple of blackberry plants in the flower garden behind it. Kiwis and raspberries surrounding the garden. Feel free to harvest what you need. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
